nodes.name: Class Consciousness
nodes.description: Recognition that society is divided into classes with opposing interests.

nodes.name: Trade Unionism
nodes.description: Organize workers at the point of production. Then: the Electoral Question.

nodes.name: Principled Abstention / Boycott
nodes.description: The ballot is a dead ritual; refuse it and agitate. An answer to the Electoral Question, not an evasion of it.
nodes.warning: Boycott of a dead ritual reads as leadership; boycott of a living hope reads as irrelevance.

nodes.name: Class-Struggle Elections
nodes.description: Candidates as agitators, office as tribune. The Debs mode: a recruitment engine, near-zero governance probability under FPTP.

nodes.name: Entryism
nodes.description: Operate inside a host duopoly machine. Immediate reach, ballot access, membership surges — and host discipline, derecognition, paper membership.
nodes.warning: Your effective platform is clamped toward the host median; past a threshold the host runs Co-opt/Divide against you.

nodes.name: Independent Ballot Line
nodes.description: Own party org, own line. Pays the FPTP terrain tax in full: ballot access, spoiler arithmetic, the rightward shift that lands on your own base.
nodes.warning: Heightening the contradictions is a real loop you own: immiseration and radicalization arrive together, and T-7 routes the mixture.

nodes.name: The Governance Road
nodes.description: Actually contest for state power. Winning is possible — and the most seductive moment in the game: the policy levers are in your hand. Then the ceiling.
nodes.warning: First ceiling contact in office opens the fork: capitulate (PASOK-ification) or rupture (the Allende limit, unless you built dual power).

nodes.name: Liquidationism
nodes.description: The revolutionary party dissolves into the mass movement's left wing. Not chosen — measured: an absorbing state you drift into by your own practice.
nodes.narrative:
"ELECTORAL SOCIALISM: The Managed Decline"

You won the election. You hold power.
And nothing changed.

The banks are still banks. The police still police.
You had power. You just couldn't use it.

THE APOCALYPSE CONTINUES, BUT NOW YOU MANAGE IT.

nodes.name: Democratic Centralism
nodes.description: Freedom of discussion, unity of action.

nodes.name: Mass Line
nodes.description: From the masses, to the masses.

nodes.name: United Front
nodes.description: Unity with all progressive forces against the principal enemy.
nodes.narrative:
The Scientific path is complete.
All actions receive +10% effectiveness.
Traps are no longer accessible (CLASS_ANALYSIS too high).

nodes.name: Armed Vanguard
nodes.description: The revolution will be armed or it will not be.

nodes.name: Adventurism
nodes.narrative:
"PROPAGANDA OF THE DEED: The Spiral"

You struck. Again and again.
And the people watched in horror.

Not horror at the State. Horror at YOU.
Your communiques went unread.
The State used your actions to justify everything.

THE REVOLUTION DIED SO YOUR WAR COULD CONTINUE.
